attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT COALESCE(TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS TRANSACTION_ID,
COALESCE(SLA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,0) AS REFERENCE_ACCOUNT,
CAST(COALESCE(CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS VARCHAR(19))) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
-1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(CREATION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATION_DATE,
-1 AS CREATED_BY,
-1 AS LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ORGANIZATION_ID,
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(TRANSACTION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
TRANSACTION_QTY AS PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
COALESCE(ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE,'') AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE, 
LEDGER_AMOUNT AS BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE,
LEDGER_AMOUNT AS RATE_OR_AMOUNT,
COST_ELEMENT_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) REFRESH_DATETIME,
LEDGER_AMOUNT,
AE_HEADER_ID,
AE_LINE_NUM,
GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,
FULFILL_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(FULFILL_ORG_ID,0) AS FULFILL_ORG_ID,
COALESCE(SLA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,0) AS SLA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
OFFSET_NUMBER,
PARTITION_NUMBER,
RECORD_COUNT,
COALESCE(CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID,
COALESCE(TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID,0) AS TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID,
COALESCE(CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,0) AS CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,
COALESCE(ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,0) AS ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.PST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
